web.domains.privacy_defaults_description.text: Tautūhia ngā kōwhiringa matatapu taunoa mō ngā karere huna i hangaia i raro i tēnei rohe. Ka tāpiritia ōnamata ēnei tautuhinga ina waihanga karere huna hōu.

web.domains.if_you_already_have_a_cname_.text: Mēnā kua whai kē koe i tētahi tuhinga CNAME mō taua wāhitau, tēnā hurihia kia tohu ki

web.domains.a_cname_record_is_not_allowe.text: ), kāore e whakaaetia tētahi tuhinga CNAME. Engari, me waihanga koe i tētahi tuhinga A. Ka whakaratohia ngā taipitopito mo te pēhea te mahi i tēnei ki raro iho o te whārangi.

web.domains.and_remove_any_other_a_aaaa_.text: ā, tangohia ētahi atu tuhinga A, AAAA, CNAME rānei mō taua wāhitau tonu.

web.domains.dns_changes_can_take_as_litt.text: Ka taea e ngā whakarerekētanga DNS kia iti ake i te 60 hēkona -- tae atu rānei ki te 24 haora -- kia whai pānga.

web.domains.dns_widget_description.text: Whakamahia te taputapu i raro nei hei kite aunoa i tō kaiwhakarato DNS me te tiki i ngā tohutohu āhua-ki-āhua hei tautūhinga o tō rohe.

web.domains.status_tooltip_not_verified.text: Kāore i manatokohia te rohe — pāwhiria hei manatoko

web.domains.email.provider_inherit_descr.text: Ka whakamahi i te tautūhinga tuku īmēra taunoa o tō pūkete

web.domains.email.access_denied_descript.text: Kāore tō mana ki te whakahaere i ngā tautuhinga īmēra mō tēnei rohe. Whakapā ki tō kaiwhakahaere rōpū.

web.domains.email.update_success.text: Kua tiakina angitū te tautūhinga īmēra

web.domains.email.delete_success.text: Kua tangohia angitū te tautūhinga īmēra

web.domains.email.default_sender_notice.text: Ka tukuna ngā īmēra mō tēnei rohe ināianei mai i te kaiwhakaaro ā-ao. Whakairohia te tautūhinga īmēra hei whakamahi i tō ake tuakiri kaiwhakaaro.

web.domains.email.disabled_notice.text: Kua monokia ināianei te tuku īmēra ritenga. Ka tukua ngā īmēra mai i te kaiwhakaaro ā-ao. Whakahohea te āhuatanga i raro nei hei whakamahi i tō tuakiri kaiwhakaaro ritenga.

web.domains.email.test_email_hint.text: Tukuna tētahi īmēra whakamātau ki a koe anō mā te tautūhinga tiakina. Ka mahi ahakoa kāore anō i whakahohea te āhuatanga.

web.domains.email.test_email_sent.text: Kua tukuna angitū te īmēra whakamātau

web.domains.email.badge_default_sender.text: E whakamahi ana i te kaiwhakaaro taunoa

web.domains.email.tooltip_not_configured.text: Kāore he kaiwhakaaro īmēra i tautūhia — ka whakamahi ngā īmēra i te kaiwhakaaro taunoa papa

web.domains.email.tooltip_pending.text: Kei te tatari manatoko te tautūhinga kaiwhakaaro īmēra — ka whakamahi ngā īmēra i te kaiwhakaaro taunoa papa

web.domains.email.tooltip_disabled.text: Kua monokia te kaiwhakaaro īmēra — ka whakamahi ngā īmēra i te kaiwhakaaro taunoa papa

web.domains.incoming.access_denied_descr.text: Kāore tō mana ki te whakahaere i ngā tautuhinga karere huna tae mai mō tēnei rohe. Whakapā ki tō kaiwhakahaere rōpū.

web.domains.incoming.not_configured_noti.text: Kāore i tautūhia ngā karere huna tae mai mō tēnei rohe. Tāpiritia ngā kaipūtake hei tukua i ngā kaiwhakamahi ā-waho ki te tuku karere huna ki tō rōpū.

web.domains.incoming.disabled_notice.text: Kua monokia ināianei ngā karere huna tae mai. Kāore ngā kaiwhakamahi ā-waho e taea ana ki te tuku karere huna ki ngā kaipūtake i runga i tēnei rohe. Whakahohea te āhuatanga i raro nei hei tukua i ngā karere huna tae mai.

web.domains.incoming.recipients_descript.text: Whakatūhia ko wai ka taea te whiwhi i ngā karere huna tae mai i runga i tēnei rohe. Ka tukua ngā pānuitanga īmēra ki ngā kaipūtake ina tukua ana tētahi karere huna ki a rātou.
